{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# Windows-Memory-Informer.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png)  ![:inline](/images/elmo.gif) 

### Description

Windows-Memory-Informer.sys is a vulnerable kernel driver from the KeServiceDescriptorTable/vulnerable-drivers repository. The driver exposes dangerous kernel primitives to usermode.
- **UUID**: e354b869-e817-4f9f-8027-a3d5bfb3689b
- **Created**: 2026-04-17
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint](https://twitter.com/@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/6a978194ee4214b2410f70862663d977.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "Windows-Memory-Informer.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create Windows-Memory-Informer binPath=C:\windows\temp\Windows-Memory-Informer.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start Windows-Memory-Informer
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |

{{< column >}}

{{< /details >}}

{{< details "Expand" >}}
* RtlInitUnicodeString
* DbgPrint
* KeLowerIrql
* KfRaiseIrql
* KeInitializeSpinLock
* KeAcquireSpinLockAtDpcLevel
* KeAcquireSpinLockRaiseToDpc
* KeReleaseSpinLock
* KeReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel
* ExAllocatePool
* ExAllocatePoolWithTag
* ExFreePoolWithTag
* IofCompleteRequest
* IoCreateDevice
* IoCreateSymbolicLink
* IoDeleteDevice
* IoDeleteSymbolicLink
* IoReleaseRemoveLockEx
* ObfDereferenceObject
* ObRegisterCallbacks
* ObUnRegisterCallbacks
* MmIsAddressValid
* PsGetProcessId
* PsLookupProcessByProcessId
* PsGetProcessSectionBaseAddress
* ZwQuerySystemInformation
* ObReferenceObjectByName
* IoCreateDriver
* PsProcessType
* IoDriverObjectType
* ExAllocatePool2
* MmUnmapIoSpace
* MmMapIoSpaceEx
* ZwClose
* MmGetPhysicalMemoryRanges
* MmCopyMemory
* MmGetVirtualForPhysical
* ObOpenObjectByPointer
* PsGetProcessPeb
* ZwQueryInformationProcess
